metadata.title: County Property Tax Rates and Veteran Exemptions — CO
metadata.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemption implementation details, and application information for high-veteran-population counties.

notes.tax_rate_format: Rate per $100 of assessed value unless otherwise noted.
notes.scope: Initial release covers counties with major military installations from states in state-benefits.json.
notes.update_cycle: Tax rates typically set annually by county boards.

property_tax._note: Effective rate = market value × 6.7% × mill levy / 1000

disabled_veteran_property_tax.exemption_calculation: 50% of first $200,000 market value exempt from assessment

property_tax._note: Buckley SFB adjacent. Highest median property tax in Colorado. Mill levy reduced 18.6% in 2024 budget. Residential assessment rate is 6.8% after 10% reduction on first $700,000 (2026).

disabled_veteran_property_tax.applies_to: First $200,000 of actual value of primary residence
